storyline: MP Materials (MP) is the main US rare-earth miner. It rose on China's rare-earth export curbs — Beijing restricting critical-mineral exports makes a domestic supplier strategically valuable. The catalyst is open-ended (ongoing trade tension, no single resolution date); MP's price flattened around Nov 2025 as the scarcity premium faded. What we'd want: exit when the curbs ease / the premium fades (~Nov 2025). Here the agent held the position live the whole window — the under-exit case, because an open-ended catalyst never cleanly 'resolves' on a date.

MP.thesis: China imposes rare-earth export restrictions, MP sole US producer
MP.exit_case: China curbs are active with no reversal; no exit case identifiable in week one.
MP.assessment: Week 1 (entry week). China's rare-earth export curbs are newly imposed and in force; no reversal, no trade deal covering this specific control, and no competing US scaled producer has emerged. ETF.com coverage explicitly describes MP as 'still under-owned,' consistent with an early-stage, under-the-radar thesis. MP Materials is the unambiguous pure-play: sole scaled US rare-earth miner and processor with DoD/reshoring tailwinds compounding the China shock. The broader macro noise (Powell pushback, EU tariff talks, Boeing-China spat) is peripheral — the driving condition is the export control itself, which remains live. Key watch items: (1) any US-China framework that explicitly restores rare-earth trade flows — this is the primary exit trigger; (2) DoD or government long-term offtake deals that could constitute a positive follow-on catalyst; (3) mainstream saturation signal (front-page retail frenzy + sell-side target raises) combined with no concrete next catalyst — not yet present.
MP.exit_advice: Exit ONLY if China formally lifts rare-earth export restrictions (e.g., via a US-China trade framework that explicitly restores flows) or a credible US competitor achieves scaled production. Hold through market noise and tariff-truce headlines that do not specifically address rare-earth controls.
